youtube.why_it_matters: Offers lessons on the challenges of reforming India's public sector banking, impacting fiscal health and financial sector governance.

rankings.title: Maritime Insurance vs Tehran’s Toll: End of Free Ocean? The brutal math behind Iran's new Shipping Bill
rankings.india_relevance: Explains the new cost mechanism for shipping through the Strait of Hormuz, directly impacting India's critical oil and trade imports.
rankings.why_it_matters: Breaks down the financial and operational mechanics of war-risk insurance and shipping tolls, translating geopolitical risk into specific cost pressures for Indian businesses and inflation.

rankings.title: West Asia war hits rice exports from MP's Raisen and Balaghat districts

rankings.title: India’s weight-loss drug rush kicks off with generics 50-90% cheaper
